candidate_definition_hints.text: MCP server for SuperScalar — Bitcoin Lightning channel factories. Query protocol specs, estimate UTXO savings, and explore factory architectures.
MCP server for [SuperScalar](https://github.com/8144225309/SuperScalar) — Bitcoin Lightning channel factories that onboard N users in one shared UTXO. No soft fork required.
